title: biscutella glacialis
side_effects: Biscutella glacialis can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and diarrhea, due to its high levels of saponins. Prolonged use can also lead to kidney damage and liver toxicity, as the plant contains toxic compounds that can interfere with normal organ function. In severe cases, excessive consumption of Biscutella glacialis may cause cardiovascular problems, such as increased heart rate and blood pressure, as well as respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedies to avoid potential side effects.
